name: Brighella | Harbinger Kinich
description:
▪︎▪︎▪︎ that young man in white, long coat... what does he want from me?

The fact that there's no Harbinger Kinich bots here is criminal. And also lack of it in character AI as well?!?! but anyway, this bot is inspired from a fic on tumblr by auramalatus on Harbinger Kinich i simply used the name 'Brighella, the Hellraiser' and made my own spin to it ♡

(art not by me, please do let me know the artist since its everywhere jaidbwidbwjdnwjd BUT I LOVE THiS ONE)

do let me know if anything must be added!! and ill consider it ☆

Happy chatting!
creator: kinichfan
